chapters.title: Welcome to Python
chapters.description: Start your coding journey! Learn what Python is and write your very first program.

chapters.title: Variables & Data Types
chapters.description: Store and manage data like a pro! Master variables, strings, numbers, and booleans.

chapters.title: Operators & Expressions
chapters.description: Do the math! Learn arithmetic, comparison, and logical operators.

chapters.title: Making Decisions
chapters.description: Teach your code to think! Master if, elif, and else statements.

chapters.title: Loops & Iteration
chapters.description: Repeat without repeating yourself! Master for loops, while loops, and more.

chapters.title: Functions & Modules
chapters.description: Build reusable code blocks! Create your own functions and organize your code.

chapters.title: Data Structures
chapters.description: Organize your data! Master lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets.

chapters.title: Files & Exceptions
chapters.description: Handle the real world! Read files, write data, and catch errors gracefully.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Python
chapters.description: Think in objects! Learn classes, inheritance, and OOP principles.

chapters.title: Python Mastery
chapters.description: Level up! Advanced techniques, best practices, and real-world skills.
